Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There are a lot more customers[n]than usual today...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Customers asked lots of questions... But I[n]explained everything politely and clearly...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I worked hard to satisfy each[n]customer on a frantically busy day...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A customer was pleased when I suggested[n]a healing stone that suited them...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The spell dolls sold like hotcakes... I attended[n]to customers while restocking products...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It was a stressful day, but the soothing effect[n]of the store helped me get through it...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The healing music playing in the[n]store helped me stay relaxed...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}All right, I'm going to increase your hourly wage! People need to be rewarded for their hard work.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Since I'm getting the hang of things,[n]they're giving me a slight raise...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hey, a customer complimented you earlier. You should work here full-time after you graduate![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Since I've gotten better at my work,[n]they're giving me a slight raise...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Whew, you were a big help today! Thanks. I added a bit of a bonus for you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After working awhile with spiritual[n]gemstones, my {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}[n]and {f 4 30 1 1 1 0} increased...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's getting late... I should[n]head back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
